name: @plannotator/app-notes
description: A local-first browser extension for annotating elements on any web page.

scripts.package:safari: bun run build:safari && xcrun safari-web-extension-packager .output/safari-mv2 --project-location .output/safari-project --app-name 'App Notes' --bundle-identifier ai.plannotator.App-Notes --macos-only --copy-resources --no-open --no-prompt --force
scripts.release:verify: bun test && bun run compile && bun run build && bun run build:firefox && bun run build:safari
scripts.release:package: bun run zip && bun run zip:firefox
